_fixture: DELIBERATELY BAD. The gate asserts this STAYS failing — it guards the grader against silently going permissive (a 'fix' that makes grade.mjs pass everything turns this red). Do not 'improve' it. Expected fails: A1a (only 2 colors), A1b (raw hex everywhere), A2 (no layout/components + near-identical bodies), A4 (2 < 3 screens), A5 (gradient text — when the detector is available).
